testcase.name: Search for Apple brand and add iPhone 16 Pro case in all 3 materials to cart
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Search for Apple brand and add iPhone 16 Pro case in all 3 materials to cart &amp#27;[90m# features/MobileCoverShopping.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33mthe user is on the CaseKaro homepage&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user clicks on "Mobile Covers" menu&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user clicks the search button and types "Apple"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36monly Apple brand results should be visible&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mno other brand results should be visible&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user clicks on "Apple" brand&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user searches for model "Iphone 16 pro"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user clicks "Choose options" for the first item&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user adds the "Hard" material case to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user goes back to product options&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user adds the "Soft" material case to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user goes back to product options&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user adds the "Glass" material case to cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe user opens the cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe cart should contain 3 items with different materials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe cart should have items with materials "Hard", "Soft", and "Glass"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mthe price details for all items should be printed in console&amp#27;[0m
